_comment: Operator-approved, evidence-backed play assignments and changes. The play-consistency gate (src/play-consistency.js) FAILS CLOSED on any manifest<->CRM play conflict unless a matching approved decision here authorizes it. A decision is not a way to make numbers agree — it records the evidence that justifies the play, with the buyer and disqualifier reasoning. from_play may be null for a first assignment.

decisions.rationale: Nominated as the genuine GNK-DATA-01 account for the six-account smoke's DATA-01 slot (replacing Zero Networks, which resolved to BE-01 and is already covered by SecureSafe). Verified public trigger: Zonos acquired Evolve Trade Services (a licensed US customs brokerage) on 2026-04-30 and is integrating it into its cross-border operating system ahead of new US postal entry-filing rules that make structured customs entry filing a requirement. This is a DATA-01 fit: an operations-heavy company with an expensive workflow crossing brittle business systems (customs clearance, entry filing, duty/tax and HS-code data reconciliation) under a systems-integration + regulatory-change trigger, with an operations buyer (Head of Supply Chain). GNK-BE-01 REJECTED for the smoke slot: the bounded opportunity is data/process automation of entry filing and customs-data flows, not backend reliability of a critical service path. GNK-AI-01 REJECTED: no pre-production AI workflow is the driver; the work is trade-data/business-systems integration. The legacy CRM import carries Zonos under both GNK-AI-01 (Chief Data Scientist contact) and GNK-BE-01 (Head of Supply Chain contact); both are reconciled to GNK-DATA-01 here so the fail-closed gate passes. Underlying duplicate leads are a legacy-import data-quality issue for PR#7 account dedup.

Companion decision to the GNK-BE-01 -> GNK-DATA-01 change above: the legacy import also sourced Zonos under GNK-AI-01 (a Chief Data Scientist contact and an AI-workflow-reliability angle). That framing is superseded — the Evolve Trade Services acquisition makes the bounded, defensible engagement customs entry-filing and trade-data integration (GNK-DATA-01), not productionizing a pre-production AI workflow (GNK-AI-01's target). Recorded so the fail-closed gate reconciles the AI-01 duplicate rather than ignoring it.

Resolved from evidence, not to force manifest/CRM agreement. Public trigger: 'AI Segmentation Is Here' (2026-04-21) — a microsegmentation / zero-trust security vendor scaling with public growth and customer proof. Intended buyer is Chris Boehm, Field CTO (sourcing router: Benny Lakunishok, Co-Founder/CEO) — CTO-level infrastructure owners. The sourcing hypothesis already frames the fit as GNK's 'rescue and hardening lanes'. GNK-DATA-01 REJECTED: it targets an operations-heavy company with an internal spreadsheet/manual-handoff workflow and a Director of Business Systems/Operations buyer; there is no evidence of an internal ops-automation pain and the buyer is a Field CTO — wrong target and wrong buyer. GNK-AI-01 CONSIDERED but REJECTED: its target is a client whose AI workflow is not yet production-safe, but Zero Networks' AI Segmentation is a GA commercial product and core IP with no pre-production gap for GNK to close, and a security vendor will not outsource the core of its own security-AI product (trips the 'prototype/demo only' disqualifier, inverted). GNK-BE-01 CHOSEN: business-critical security infrastructure at scale, buyer alignment (CTO/VP-Eng/Platform Lead), and a bounded backend-hardening outcome that does not require handing over product IP. This coincides with the existing CRM play, but the decision stands on the evidence above.

The legacy CRM import also sourced Zero Networks under GNK-AI-01 (a duplicate lead). That assignment is superseded by the GNK-BE-01 decision above: Zero Networks' AI Segmentation is a shipped GA product and core IP, so there is no pre-production AI workflow for GNK to productionize (GNK-AI-01's target). The bounded, defensible engagement is backend risk/stabilization on their scaling zero-trust enforcement infrastructure (GNK-BE-01), consistent with the Field-CTO buyer. Recorded so the fail-closed play-consistency gate reconciles the AI-01 duplicate rather than silently ignoring it. NOTE: the underlying duplicate Zero Networks leads are a legacy-import data-quality issue slated for first-class account dedup in PR#7.
